_note: LLM-named cluster labels under a peer-level, mutually-exclusive constraint. Two tiers: coarse (always visible) and fine (revealed on zoom). Keyed by the cluster_id that scripts/build-map-data.mjs assigns (stable given fixed clustering params). Regenerate this file with a single batched LLM call whenever clustering params change. Applied by scripts/label-clusters.mjs.
_prompt: Name each of these dementia-genetics clusters with a 1-3 word label. Every COARSE label must be a research theme at the same level of abstraction (peers, the way 'Neuroinflammation' and 'Cerebrovascular' are peers). Every FINE label must be a specific gene-anchored mechanism or phenotype, a peer of the others in its tier. Labels within a tier must be mutually exclusive. Ground each name in the cluster's top genes, title terms, and exemplar titles.
